overview.description: The Goose Hollow Tactical Allocation ETF (GHTA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively-managed fund that aims for total return by allocating roughly 45/55 in equities and fixed income ETFs globally. The fund can allocate up to 20% in futures contracts to hedge its portfolio. GHTA was launched on Nov 16, 2021 and is issued by Goose Hollow.
